description_long: This hammer features a large, rectangular head with beveled edges and a textured, dark gray surface, giving it a robust and heavy-duty appearance. The head is attached to a cylindrical handle wrapped in a reddish-brown grip, which is segmented with metallic bands for enhanced hold and durability. A metallic cap tops the handle, and a red looped strap is affixed to the end, likely for wrist security or hanging storage. The striking face of the hammer is flat and broad, suitable for delivering powerful blows, while the sides of the head are slightly faceted. The overall design is reminiscent of a sledgehammer or a stylized tool, with a modern, almost iconic look. No visible branding or wear is present, and the hammer appears to be in pristine condition.
description: A heavy, rectangular-headed hammer with a textured dark gray head and a reddish-brown, banded handle featuring a wrist strap. The design is robust and pristine, with no visible branding or wear.
description_view_0: The hammer is shown at an angle, highlighting the textured head, the full length of the reddish-brown handle, and the attached wrist strap.
description_view_1: This view displays the flat striking face of the hammer head and the straight alignment of the handle, emphasizing the metallic bands and the strap attachment.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the hammer is visible, showing the faceted edges of the head and the continuous grip pattern on the handle.
description_view_3: A top-down perspective reveals the metallic cap at the end of the handle and the attachment point of the wrist strap, as well as the rectangular shape of the head.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle wrapped in reddish-brown synthetic material with metallic bands for grip enhancement and a looped strap at the end.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledge-type head with beveled edges, flat striking faces, and a textured dark gray finish.
attribute_attachment_or_accessory: Red wrist strap attached to the end of the handle
